trigger: Operator invoked 'ultrathink' + /superpowers:systematic-debugging on 2026-05-05 against the agent's prior claim of 'clause 6.I closure'. Phase 1 root-cause investigation surfaced a multi-AVD port-collision architectural bluff in Submodules/Containers/pkg/emulator/Boot() — every iteration of the multi-AVD matrix had been targeting the SAME emulator on port 5555, while the runner's attestation falsely recorded test_passed=true for each AVD.
constitutional_anchor: root /CLAUDE.md §6.I clauses 1-8 + Seventh Law clause 6 (Bluff Discovery Protocol) + clause 6.J (Anti-Bluff Functional Reality Mandate)

what_was_actually_fixed_correctly_in_pri.clause: 6.I clause 6 (cold-boot-only reporting — boot_seconds includes WaitForBoot duration)
what_was_actually_fixed_correctly_in_pri.status: STANDS — independent fix to matrix.go's BootDuration accumulation; not affected by the port-collision bug. Post-architectural-fix run confirms boot_seconds now reports real cold-boot time (12-28s across the 5 AVDs).

STANDS — the helper's logic (require all_passed=true, API coverage of {28, 30, 34, ≥36}, phone form factor) is correct. Falsifiability rehearsed in 5 negative scenarios. Note: the gate now PROPERLY rejects this commit's attestation because Pixel_9a (API 36) failed.

STANDS — that rehearsal was a single-AVD run on CZ_API34_Phone. Single-AVD matrix runs do NOT trigger the port-collision bug (only one emulator exists, on the only port). The mutation rehearsal correctly broke Challenge00 on the real CZ_API34_Phone.

what_was_BLUFF_and_is_RETRACTED.claim_retracted: 5-AVD matrix passed Challenge00 across {API 28 + 30 + 34 phone + 34 tablet + 36}
what_was_BLUFF_and_is_RETRACTED.why_it_was_a_bluff: Diagnostic instrumentation added in this session captured the per-iteration adb-devices state + ro.product.model. PRE-fix output: every iteration targeted localhost:5555 with identical model string 'Android SDK built for x86_64'. Only the FIRST AVD (CZ_API28_Phone) was actually under test, 5 times. The 4 other rows tested the same emulator while their named AVDs ran in the background, untested, and got killed by the next iteration's Teardown.

The CZ_API34_Tablet AVD WAS created and DID launch, but the matrix never targeted its port. The 'tablet form factor PASS' row in that attestation actually represents the API-28 phone emulator running Challenge00 a 4th time.
what_was_BLUFF_and_is_RETRACTED.constitutional_status: RETRACTED — to be re-closed in this commit

true_clause_6_I_status_after_architectur.clause_1_container_bound: OPEN — broader 6.K-debt; the post-fix matrix still runs on bare host. Container-bound run is owed at the next phase that touches release tagging.

clause_2_android_version_minimums.API_28: PASS — CZ_API28_Phone tested correctly post-fix, Challenge00 passed in 43.24s
clause_2_android_version_minimums.API_30: PASS — CZ_API30_Phone tested correctly post-fix, Challenge00 passed in 54.38s
clause_2_android_version_minimums.API_34: PASS — CZ_API34_Phone tested correctly post-fix, Challenge00 passed in 69.96s
clause_2_android_version_minimums.latest_stable_API_36: FAIL — Pixel_9a tested correctly post-fix for the FIRST time, Challenge00 FAILED with exit status 1 after 60.58s. This is a NEWLY-DISCOVERED real failure that the bluff was masking.

clause_3_screen_size_coverage.phone_class: PASS — 4 phone-class AVDs in the post-fix run, all but Pixel_9a passed
clause_3_screen_size_coverage.tablet_class: PASS — CZ_API34_Tablet tested correctly post-fix, Challenge00 passed in 60.22s. The tablet form factor IS now closed for Challenge00 (which is a layout-agnostic test that asserts on text labels). Features whose layout could differ on tablet would still need their own tablet-specific Challenge Tests.

true_clause_6_I_status_after_architectur.clause_4_per_avd_attestation_row: PASS — 5 rows recorded, each carrying distinct AVD/api_level/form_factor and (post-fix) actually-distinct test outcomes

clause_5_falsifiability_rehearsal.API_34_class: PASS (commit 8e66c53 — single-AVD run, unaffected by the port-collision bug)
clause_5_falsifiability_rehearsal.API_36_class: OWED — but moot until the actual Pixel_9a failure is diagnosed and fixed
clause_5_falsifiability_rehearsal.architectural_falsifiability: PASS — TestAndroidEmulator_Boot_DiscoversNewSerial_WhenPriorEmulatorPersists in Containers commit 648a4bb. Mutation: revert Boot() to hardcoded ports → test fails 'expected 5557 but got 5555'. Reverted; passes.

true_clause_6_I_status_after_architectur.clause_6_cold_boot_only_reporting: PASS — BootResult.BootDuration now includes WaitForBoot elapsed (Containers 23b4fa9). Post-architectural-fix run shows real cold-boot times: 12.46s, 25.85s, 23.28s, 23.14s, 28.18s.
true_clause_6_I_status_after_architectur.clause_7_tag_sh_enforcement: PASS — helper added in Lava 8e66c53. Falsifiability rehearsed in 5 negative paths. NOTE: the helper now correctly REJECTS the post-fix attestation because Pixel_9a's row has test_passed=false → all_passed=false. The gate is doing its job.
true_clause_6_I_status_after_architectur.clause_8_inheritance: PASS — clause 6.M propagated to all 16 submodules (commit 20539d5)

newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.discovered_by: the architectural fix surfacing the real per-AVD test outcome
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.severity: BLOCKER for clause 6.I clause 2 latest-stable coverage
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.reproduction: single-AVD matrix on Pixel_9a alone (untainted by port collision)
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.diagnosis_owed: matrix runner does not persist gradle stdout; re-run on Pixel_9a alone with --info to capture the actual JUnit failure. Likely candidates: InputManager.getInstance NoSuchMethodException (previously seen on Pixel_9a in this codebase), Compose semantics-tree differences at API 36, or a Hilt entry-point compatibility issue.
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.owed_at: Before the next release tag — clause 6.I clause 7 (tag.sh helper) will refuse to operate on this commit.

newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.gap: Teardown unreliability — `adb -s localhost:<port> emu kill` not actually killing the emulator process
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.discovered_by: orphan emulator accumulation observed during diagnostic runs (5 qemu-system PIDs surviving after matrix completion)
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.severity: Medium — does not compromise per-AVD test results post-discovery-fix, but accumulates state pressure
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.remediation: Investigate `adb emu kill` on this host's SDK version. Consider falling back to `kill -TERM <qemu-system pid>` after a timeout. The clause-6.M zombie-cleanup hook in scripts/run-emulator-tests.sh handles cleanup at the START of the next run as a stopgap.
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.owed_at: Next phase that touches the matrix runner.

newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.gap: Per-AVD falsifiability rehearsal for API 28, 30, 36 (clause 6.I clause 5)
newly_open_gaps_after_this_session.owed_at: Next phase that touches the persistence path.

summary: Operator's 'ultrathink' invocation surfaced a 7-day-old architectural bluff in the matrix runner. The fix is in (Containers commit 648a4bb), unit-test-pinned with falsifiability, and verified by the post-fix diagnostic run. The fix exposed a REAL Pixel_9a Challenge00 failure that was hidden by the bluff for ~2 hours. The prior 'clause 6.I closure' attestations (commits e3bcae3 + 8e66c53) are partially RETRACTED per Seventh Law clause 6; the parts that stand are noted explicitly. Phase 1.1 (sessionSignaledState persistence) remains valid for API 28, 30, 34 phone + tablet — but Pixel_9a (API 36 = latest stable) is now an OPEN gap that blocks the next release tag.
